subject: A small female-presenting figure with large pink twin-tails, wearing a purple and pink deity-style outfit with white accents, surrounded by swirling pink and magenta magical energy.
suspected_ip: Supreme Kai of Time (Chronoa) — Dragon Ball Xenoverse / Dragon Ball Heroes
description: A petite female-presenting deity figure stands against a swirling magenta and pink energy background. The figure has very large, distinctive pink twin-tail hair — an immediately recognizable silhouette. She wears a purple and pink outfit with white trim that reads as a ceremonial or divine uniform, with a high collar. Her expression appears animated and open-mouthed, possibly speaking or issuing a command. The surrounding energy swirls are pink and violet, creating a magical, otherworldly atmosphere. The overall palette is almost entirely pink and purple.
foreground: Petite deity figure with large pink twin-tails in purple-and-pink ceremonial outfit
background: Swirling pink and violet magical energy
emotion: Emphatic, commanding — open-mouthed expression of authority or urgency
